candidate_definition_hints.text: Releasing code for "ReCode: Robustness Evaluation of Code Generation Models"

This is the repo for ReCode ([arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2212.10264)), providing a comprehensive evaluation for the practical robustness of code generation models like CodeGEN, Incoder, GPT-J. In specific, this benchmark provides over 30 different general perturbations on docs…
